name: MP9 | 飞驰
descriptionEn: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. It has been painted using a striped hydrographic arranged in a chevron pattern. Throw enough downfield and you're bound to hit the bullseye eventually
descriptionZh: 由瑞士制造，尖端的 MP9 微型冲锋枪是一把符合人类工效学的聚合物武器，深受私人保安公司青睐。 这把武器使用以人字形图案排列的条纹花纹进行了涂装。 前冲到位，最终势必命中靶心
